jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Granules India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
